name: live-mtg
description: Real-time bilingual meeting minutes and AI meeting copilot for Claude Code or Codex

scripts.test: node --check cli/live-mtg.mjs && node scripts/check-index-js.mjs && python3 -m py_compile server.py make-mindmap.py scripts/sync-slide-work.py && python3 scripts/test-i18n.py && python3 scripts/test-branding.py && python3 scripts/test-ui.py && python3 scripts/test-cli-home.py && python3 scripts/test-parallel-analysis.py && python3 scripts/test-cancellable-jobs.py && python3 scripts/test-strategy-identity.py && python3 scripts/test-speaker-diarization.py && python3 scripts/test-slide-work.py
